dogfood.command: runx skill mamonisme/agency-health@sha-ce6cc60ad96e --registry https://api.runx.ai -i data_source_ref=local://runx-agency/health-dev -i case_id=case-healthy-001 -i agency_ref=health-dev -i store_id=health-dev --input-json period='{"from":"2026-07-01T00:00:00Z","to":"2026-07-08T00:00:00Z"}' --json --approve-operator-context sha256:7a39de8fcb8a3538a0dde29390df40c6578fa1a4478b7cd342d26a982631e630 --receipts /tmp/dogfood-receipts
dogfood.verify_verdict: sealed (POST-PUBLISH dogfood run via runx skill --registry https://api.runx.ai; distinct from any harness fixture seal). Receipt schema runx.receipt.v1, registry-signed Ed25519, trust_state=trusted, trust_tier=community, version=sha-ce6cc60ad96e. runx verify offline shows signature=local-development (prod RUNX_RECEIPT_VERIFY_* keys absent on host) — documented local-runtime limitation, not a broken receipt.

observations.summary: Published runx skill agency-health (read-only agency health bundle) to the hosted registry; dogfooded on a real input via the live registry; sealed receipt recorded.
observations.audience: developers operating a runx agency who need a reproducible health readout
observations.why_allowed: public GitHub PR + hosted registry listing are the canonical public adoption surfaces for a runx skill; no private context required

graded_findings.seal_rate: graded from ledger read runner aggregate (id-stub only)

observations.intervention_grounding: each finding cites its grounding case_id and turn or ledger id-stub
observations.refused_reason: agency_ref with no readable case events over the period -> decision needs_more_evidence, no findings graded, no intervention emitted (no-case-events-stop; read-only refusal guard also exercised by agency-health-readonly-stop -> needs_agent)
observations.ledger_id_stubs: referenced by id-stub only (audit-only ledger read runner, never a domain-keyed state read)
observations.read_only_guard: refuses to grade a signal not grounded in the folded case projection or a ledger id-stub aggregate; refuses to invent caps/thresholds not in the charter snapshot or supplied baseline; never invents turn state the sealed event order does not show
